---
marp: true
style: |
  .quote-box {
    background: #f8f4ff;
    border-left: 5px solid #4a3a8a;
    padding: 0.6em 1em;
    border-radius: 4px;
    margin: 0.5em 0;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #2a1a5a;
  }
---

<aside class="quote-box">
This callout contains neutral placeholder prose for layout testing.
It keeps multiple sentences so paragraph extraction still has enough text.
The wording is intentionally plain and does not describe any real project.

Default mode is `Example`. Optional mode is `Alternate`.
</aside>
